commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 19:11 And, behold, Amariah the chief priest is over you in all matters of the LORD; and Zebadiah the son of Ishmael, the ruler of the house of Judah, for all the king's matters: also the Levites shall be officers before you. Deal courageously, and the LORD shall be with the good. Amarias, (1 Paralipomenon vi. ) or rather Azarias, the father of Johanan, 1 Paralipomenon v. Office, in civil matters. (Calmet) Here is a plain distinction between the spiritual and temporal authority, instituted by God, Deuteronomy xvii. , and Numbers xxvii. (Worthington) (Tirinus) Masters. Hebrew shot rim, to execute the sentence; (Du Hamel) or "officers. Protestants, "with the good.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
